parameters.message:

Task của bạn đang tiến gần deadline. Hãy ưu tiên xử lý để tránh bị trễ hạn.

{{ $json.taskId || 'Đang cập nhật' }}

parameters.jsCode:
const note = $json.note ?? $json.adminNote ?? $json.sourceInput ?? $json.taskDescription ?? 'Keep going.';
return [{ json: { ...$json, quote: note, author: note === 'Keep going.' ? 'System' : 'Manager note' } }];

parameters.text: =Tao 3 sub-task cho task: {{ $json.body.taskName }}. Tra ve DUY NHAT JSON array dung format nay: [{"title":"..."},{"title":"..."},{"title":"..."}]. Khong markdown, khong text khac.

={{ [
  '📌 THONG BAO GIAO TASK',
  `🆔 Ma task: ${$node["Compose Assignment Context"].json.taskId || '-'}`,
  `📝 Ten task: ${$node["Compose Assignment Context"].json.taskName || '-'}`,
  `👤 Nguoi nhan: ${$node["Compose Assignment Context"].json.assigneeEmail || '-'}`,
  `🔥 Uu tien: ${$node["Compose Assignment Context"].json.priority || '-'}`,
  `📅 Deadline: ${$node["Compose Assignment Context"].json.deadlineDisplay || 'Chua co deadline'}`,
  $node["Compose Assignment Context"].json.quote ? `💬 Ghi chu: ${$node["Compose Assignment Context"].json.quote}` : null
].filter(Boolean).join('\n') }}

parameters.subject: =🚨 [QUA HAN] {{ $json.taskName }}
parameters.message:
=
DA
Deadline Automation
Cảnh báo công việc quá hạn
{{ $json.daysLeft !== null && $json.daysLeft < 0 ? 'Tre ' + Math.abs($json.daysLeft) + ' ngay' : 'Can xu ly ngay' }}

{{ $json.taskName }}

Task cua ban da qua han. Vui long kiem tra ngay de cap nhat tien do va tranh anh huong den ke hoach chung.

Ma task
{{ $json.taskId || 'Dang cap nhat' }}
Uu tien
{{ $json.priority || 'HIGH' }}
Deadline
{{ $json.deadlineDisplay || $json.deadline || 'Chua co deadline' }}
Can thuc hien ngay
1. Kiem tra tinh trang hien tai cua task.
2. Cap nhat tien do hoac tiep tuc xu ly ngay lap tuc.
3. Neu co vuong mac, phan hoi lai cho quan ly som nhat.
Mo ta cong viec
{{ $json.taskDescription || 'Khong co mo ta chi tiet.' }}
Deadline Automation • Canh bao qua han, dong bo trang thai va ho tro theo doi tien do tu dong

parameters.text:
={{ [
  '✅ HOAN THANH SOM',
  `👤 Nhan vien: ${$node["Evaluate Completion"].json.assigneeEmail || '-'}`,
  `📝 Task: ${$node["Evaluate Completion"].json.taskName || '-'}`,
  `📅 Deadline: ${$node["Evaluate Completion"].json.deadlineDisplay || '-'}`,
  `🕒 Hoan thanh luc: ${$node["Evaluate Completion"].json.completedAtDisplay || '-'}`
].join('\n') }}
